Paul said simply, "Beware of dogs, beware of evil workers" (Philippians 3:2). (D. Kelly Ogden and Andrew C. Skinner, New Testament Apostles Testify of Christ [Salt Lake City; Deseret Book, 1998], 191)

Always retain a remission of your sins] Those who return to their sins are as a dog turned to its vomit or as the sow that was washed returning to wallow in the mire (see 2 Peter 2:22).
